mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.board_id as boardId, c.user_id as userId, u.writer as writer, u.name as name, c.content, c.writedate, c.updatedate FROM comment c JOIN gueuser u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.user_id as userId, c.board_id as boardId, u.writer as writer, u.name as name, c.content, c.writedate, c.updatedate FROM comment c JOIN gueuser u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
